mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 在 80 步内反复尝试快速点击 Load 按钮触发并发 HTTP 请求，观察 loading bar 行为。Step 28/30/32/34 明确报告：loading bar 在所有请求完成后正确消失（pending requests 回到 0，顶部进度条消失）。但由于 localhost 请求完成速度极快（< 1s），无法真正制造出多个并发请求叠加的场景来触发潜在 bug。页面无搜索框，无法模拟搜索联想场景。80 步达到上限被终止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The timer completed and the loading bar is gone. The pending requests counter is 0. The loading bar correctly disappeared after all requests completed. The issue is that my interactions with the system (clicking and taking screenshots) are too slow to capture the concurrent request state.

deploy_notes: commit f2e721d43c uses node-sass 4.7.2 (no arm64 support). Fixed with dart-sass shim replacing node-sass. Dev server on port 4501.
